description: HTML page for a web-based database visualizer interface, including styles, structure, and client-side JavaScript logic to load and display database and table data dynamically.

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches list of available databases from backend API and displays them in the sidebar.

methods.name: refreshDatabases
methods.description: Refreshes the list of databases by reloading from backend API.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Expands or collapses a database item to show its tables.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Loads table names for a selected database and displays them.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Fetches and displays data from a selected table.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Renders a data table with dynamic content, handling wide data and large objects.

methods.name: renderCell
methods.description: Renders individual cell content, handling nulls, objects, and long strings.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Expands or collapses cell content to show full data or truncate it.
